headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -95.9)
key_insights: Fears trending up 157% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 111 quotes and 90 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The 76.5 score sits in the middle-high range for frustrations over the past 99 days, showing elevated but not extreme levels.

• Both fears and optimism rebounded significantly from yesterday's lows, with fears jumping 20+ points.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
